trait.confidence_notes: No genome-wide significant chrX loci in current build. GWAS is sex-combined; dosage-compensation assumptions are not explicit.
trait.category: UK Biobank Assessment Centre > Touchscreen > Sociodemographics > Household
trait.description_more: ACE touchscreen question "How many cars or vans are owned, or available for use, by you or members of your household? (Please include company vehicles if available for private use) " If the participant activated the Help button they were shown the message:     Do not include motorcycles.      ~F728~ was collected from all participants except those who indicated they were living in a sheltered accommodation or in a care home as defined by their answers to ~F670~
